---
title: "OLS and Elastic Net"
author: "Erica"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Preparation
```{r, echo = False}
# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(lubridate)
# load data
df <- read_csv('data/final_data.csv')
# preprocessing
prepare_data <- function(df){

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      year = lubridate::year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(year, crsp_fundno) %>%
    drop_na()

  feature_names <- df %>%
    select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
    colnames()

  return(list(
    df = df,
    feature_names = feature_names
  ))
}
```

## ols
```{r}
predict_alpha_ols <- function(prepared_data){

  df <- prepared_data$df
  feature_names <- prepared_data$feature_names

  results_ols <- list()

  years <- sort(unique(df$year))
  start_year <- min(years)
  initial_train_end <- 2019

  if(!(2019 %in% years)){
    stop("Dataset must contain year 2019 for initial training window.")
  }

  for (t in (initial_train_end + 1):max(years)){

    train_full <- df %>%
      filter(year >= start_year & year <= (t - 1))

    test_data <- df %>%
      filter(year == t)

    if (nrow(test_data) == 0) next

    ols_model <- lm(
      alpha_ann ~ . - crsp_fundno - caldt - year,
      data = train_full
    )

    pred_ols <- predict(ols_model, newdata = test_data)

    temp_ols <- test_data %>%
      transmute(
        evaluation_year = year,
        crsp_fundno = crsp_fundno,
        predicted_alpha = as.numeric(pred_ols)
      )

    results_ols[[as.character(t)]] <- temp_ols
  }

  bind_rows(results_ols)
}
```

## enet
```{r}
predict_alpha_enet <- function(prepared_data){

  df <- prepared_data$df
  feature_names <- prepared_data$feature_names

  results_enet <- list()

  years <- sort(unique(df$year))
  start_year <- min(years)
  initial_train_end <- 2019

  if(!(2019 %in% years)){
    stop("Dataset must contain year 2019 for initial training window.")
  }

  for (t in (initial_train_end + 1):max(years)){

    train_full <- df %>%
      filter(year >= start_year & year <= (t - 1))

    test_data <- df %>%
      filter(year == t)

    if (nrow(test_data) == 0) next

    # hyperparameter tuning split
    tune_years <- sort(unique(train_full$year))

    split_index <- floor(0.7 * length(tune_years))

    train_years <- tune_years[1:split_index]
    valid_years <- tune_years[(split_index + 1):length(tune_years)]

    train_tune <- train_full %>%
      filter(year %in% train_years)

    valid_tune <- train_full %>%
      filter(year %in% valid_years)

    X_train <- train_tune %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_train <- train_tune$alpha_ann

    X_valid <- valid_tune %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_valid <- valid_tune$alpha_ann

    # hyperparameter search
    alphas <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.1)

    best_mse <- Inf
    best_alpha <- NULL
    best_lambda <- NULL

    for (a in alphas){

      model <- glmnet(
        X_train,
        y_train,
        alpha = a
      )

      lambdas <- model$lambda

      for (l in lambdas){

        preds <- predict(model, newx = X_valid, s = l)
        mse <- mean((y_valid - preds)^2)

        if (mse < best_mse){
          best_mse <- mse
          best_alpha <- a
          best_lambda <- l
        }
      }
    }

    # refit model
    X_full <- train_full %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_full <- train_full$alpha_ann

    enet_model <- glmnet(
      X_full,
      y_full,
      alpha = best_alpha,
      lambda = best_lambda
    )

    X_test <- test_data %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    pred_enet <- predict(enet_model, newx = X_test)

    temp_enet <- test_data %>%
      transmute(
        evaluation_year = year,
        crsp_fundno = crsp_fundno,
        predicted_alpha = as.numeric(pred_enet)
      )

    results_enet[[as.character(t)]] <- temp_enet
  }

  bind_rows(results_enet)
}
```

## produce forecast
```{r}
prepared <- prepare_data(df)
ols_predictions  <- predict_alpha_ols(prepared)
enet_predictions <- predict_alpha_enet(prepared)
```

## view results
```{r}
View(ols_predictions)
View(enet_predictions)
```
